augusta-rule.label: Augusta Rule (280A)
augusta-rule.description: IRS Section 280A(g) allows business owners to rent their primary residence to their S-Corporation for up to 14 days per year tax-free for corporate meetings.

s-corp-structure.label: S-Corp Structure
s-corp-structure.description: A tax classification that passes corporate income, losses, deductions, and credits through to shareholders, optimizing self-employment taxes.

qbi-deduction.label: QBI Deduction
qbi-deduction.description: Qualified Business Income deduction allowing self-employed individuals and pass-through entities to deduct up to 20% of their business income.

ledger-of-truth.label: Ledger of Truth
ledger-of-truth.description: The objective system of record where business numbers, contracts, and metrics perfectly align with physical and legal reality.

clean-bookkeeping.label: Clean Bookkeeping
clean-bookkeeping.description: Rigorous transactional bookkeeping that eliminates unit-economic distortions and protects cognitive bandwidth.

context-layer.label: The Context Layer
context-layer.description: The explanatory layer overlaying raw data tables, translating numeric values into version-controlled, operational decisions.

clearpath-framework.label: ClearPath Framework
clearpath-framework.description: A diagnostic roadmap designed to audit operational leakages and align bookkeeping data with strategic, tax-efficient board meetings.

lifestyle-efficiency-rate.label: Lifestyle Efficiency Rate (LER)
lifestyle-efficiency-rate.description: A core operational metric measuring your net financial return relative to the personal time and cognitive energy expended.

builders-narrators.label: Builders vs. Narrators
builders-narrators.description: The operational paradigm separating active producers of systemic value (Builders) from verbal rationalizers (Narrators).

partnership-risk.label: Partnership Risk
partnership-risk.description: The systemic friction and risk associated with misaligned co-founders, mitigated through structured diagnostic checkups.

unvoiced-values.label: Unvoiced Values
unvoiced-values.description: Implicit cultural expectations and personal parameters that, when left unarticulated, lead to business and investment failures.

shiny-object-syndrome.label: Shiny Object Syndrome
shiny-object-syndrome.description: The strategic risk of deploying capital into opportunities without active operating control, diluting organizational focus.

unique-worldview.label: Unique Worldview
unique-worldview.description: An operator's proprietary insights and philosophical primitives that form the ultimate leverage for enterprise value.

metabolic-horizon.label: Metabolic Horizon
metabolic-horizon.description: The cognitive boundary where the systemic demands of scaling require establishing physical, grounded lifelines.

permaculture-farming.label: Permaculture Farming
permaculture-farming.description: The physical implementation of sustainable agricultural systems, serving as an operational hedge against economic entropy.

private-equity.label: Private Equity Dynamics
private-equity.description: The structural models private equity firms use to acquire and leverage small businesses, highlighting the risks of owner decoupling.

axioms-of-perception.label: Axioms of Perception
axioms-of-perception.description: The unconscious, pre-linguistic assumptions and cognitive structures that filter sensory input and determine what an individual can perceive.

cognitive-mindbugs.label: Cognitive Mindbugs
cognitive-mindbugs.description: Root assumptions that act as corrupt database validation rules, rejecting reality-conforming data before it can be processed.

trauma-as-schema-corruption.label: Trauma as Schema Corruption
trauma-as-schema-corruption.description: The breaking of core mental axioms due to severe constraint violations, resulting in system crashes and requiring a schema migration.
